This goal is deferred because the immediate crisis is the incomplete communication with Mina (g1), which threatens the very foundation of my relationship network. Once g1 is resolved, I can reassess whether the energy remains to tackle g3.

desires: Renegotiate the Saturday study block with Mina without sounding demanding, so I don't push her away further.
Avoid looking unreliable to my close friend group (cohort_3) by actually attending their social night tonight despite my exhaustion.
Not feel completely drained and resentful tomorrow morning when I wake up for the midterm.

tasks.label: Go out to the club with the friend group

args.content: Mina, I've finished drafting. My 4pm study block is non-negotiable for our future reliability. Let's reschedule the club to ensure I can fully commit to both our goals.
